Name: 111th MECH BDE
Comment: Fused Intel shows the 111th is stationary in an ATK POSN just North of PL THOR. Current slant is 31/116

Name: 1BDE/0117-2
Comment: 82d ABN DIV reports HUMINT indicates a SOM cell of approximately 30 personnel are operating IVO the pro DONOVIAN BLISS district of POTI. 1/82 has been tasked to conduct cordon and search.

Name: Barasu
Comment: Donovian Town

Name: Bisyardam
Comment: Donovian Town

Name: Dakan
Comment: Donovian Town

Name: Dezashah

Name: DP2
Comment:
IF ENEMY SIT:  EN IDF Assets at OBJ MOE with no ARMOR SPT

AND

FRIENDLY SIT: 4-9 CAV at PL WESLEY at 85% Strength and 3-16 FA REDCON A.

THEN: 4-9 CAV conducts raid to destroy IDF assets, then returns to screen line along PL WESLEY

Name: DTG; Assassination
Comment: The mayor of POTI, Hwango de Bango, was shot to death outside of the POTI Municipal Building, after signing a law imposing additional movement restrictions on Donovians living in POTI. He is succeeeded by Juan Chavez, his deputy.

Name: DTG; Bomb detonated
Comment: 2 satchel remote IEDs were detonated at the POTI medical clinic; 12 civilians killed, 10 wounded. 2 US SF personnel wounded and evacuated by SF personnel

Name: DTG; Bomb detonated
Comment: 4 satchel remote IEDs were detonated at the POTI N. medical clinic; 8 civilians killed, 6 civilians wounded. 82BSB XO and driver wounded; 1 x HMWWV destroyed

Name: DTG; Bomb detonated
Comment: One satchel charge exploded at the courthouse in GARDAKERT. 4 CIV KIA, 4 x WIA. Building destroyed.

Name: DTG; Cache
Comment: HHC 3/82 reports finding a cache of 24 107mm RKTs, 44 land mines, 100 82mm MTR rounds, 4 82mm MTR Tubes, and 400kg of HME.

Name: DTG; Demonstration
Comment: 150 personnel demonstrating on MSR BLUE, IVO TAA IRON. Most placards portray Anti-American/Anti-GORGAN sentiment. Traffic currently stopped on MSR BLUE. Some demonstrators have changed themselves across the road, 82MPs on station.

Name: DTG; Demonstration
Comment: 250 pro Donovians demonstrators at 2ABCT Main CP carrying banners declaring US occupation of GORGUS a war crime. Roads in and out of CP blocked. Rocks being thrown at  2ABCT soldiers

Name: DTG; Demonstration
Comment: 250 pro Donovian student demonstrators at POTI University threatening to swarm US forces and prevent them from murdering the honarable Donovian people. Throwing rocks and bottles at US soldiers.

Name: DTG; IED
Comment: 2 x 155mm IED exploded on HHC 4-9 CAV Convoy. 4 x US WIA, 2 x US KIA, 2 x HMWWV's destroyed.  Detonator was command wire. 1 x suspected SOM wounded and arrested.

Name: DTG; IED
Comment: 5-73 reports 100kg HME based, buried water tank IED detonated on A TRP while conducting screen along PL CONTOUR. 1 MRAP destroyed. 1 US KIA, 2 x US WIA.

Name: DTG; POI
Comment: 24 rounds 82mm MTR rounds landed IVO 1/1 MECH (GORG) trail party; 12 x WIA, 4 x KIA, 1 x HMMWV Destroyed

Name: DTG; POI
Comment: 12 rounds MTR landed IVO 82ABN TAC; 1 x WIA, 1 HMMWV Destroyed

Name: DTG; POI
Comment: 24 rounds 82mm MTR rounds landed Radio Tower; tower destroyed; all commercial radio station operations halted. POO located at 13SCR 75119 43181

Name: DTG; Suspected SOM Cell
Comment: 82d ABN DIV reports HUMINT indicates a SOM cell of approximately 30 personnel are operating IVO the pro DONOVIAN BLISS district of POTI. 1/82 has been tasked to conduct cordon and search.
